entries.title: The Descent Begins
entries.content: You have entered the cursed halls of Aethelgard...

entries.title: Bestiary: Harpy
entries.content: You have slain a Harpy. Its HP is 22.

entries.title: Bestiary: Wraith
entries.content: You have slain a Wraith. Its HP is 22.

entries.title: Bestiary: Skeleton
entries.content: You have slain a Skeleton. Its HP is 22.

entries.title: Bestiary: Troll
entries.content: You have slain a Troll. Its HP is 22.

entries.title: Bestiary: Putrid Shambler
entries.content: You have slain a Putrid Shambler. Its HP is 32.

entries.title: Bestiary: Ghoul
entries.content: You have slain a Ghoul. Its HP is 22.

entries.title: Bestiary: Minotaur
entries.content: You have slain a Minotaur. Its HP is 22.

entries.title: Bestiary: Giant Rat
entries.content: You have slain a Giant Rat. Its HP is 22.

entries.title: Bestiary: Goblin
entries.content: You have slain a Goblin. Its HP is 22.

entries.title: Bestiary: Orc
entries.content: You have slain a Orc. Its HP is 22.

entries.title: Bestiary: Dark Cultist
entries.content: You have slain a Dark Cultist. Its HP is 22.

entries.title: Quest Accepted: The Truffle Smuggler
entries.content: Gather 3 Cave-Truffles from smashed barrels on floors 1-5.

entries.title: Quest Accepted: Reclaiming the Ledger
entries.content: Kill the Goblin Footpad (elite goblin) on the next floor.

entries.title: Quest Accepted: A Taste for Venom
entries.content: Bring 5 Poison Glands from Putrid Shamblers.

entries.title: Bestiary: Goblin Footpad
entries.content: You have slain a Goblin Footpad. Its HP is 33.0.

entries.title: Bestiary: Harpy (Mastery)
entries.content: You now understand Harpy's abilities. +1 damage against this type.

entries.title: Bestiary: Troll (Mastery)
entries.content: You now understand Troll's abilities. +1 damage against this type.

entries.title: Bestiary: Giant Rat (Mastery)
entries.content: You now understand Giant Rat's abilities. +1 damage against this type.

entries.title: Bestiary: Orc (Mastery)
entries.content: You now understand Orc's abilities. +1 damage against this type.

entries.title: Bestiary: Goblin (Mastery)
entries.content: You now understand Goblin's abilities. +1 damage against this type.

entries.title: Bestiary: Wraith (Mastery)
entries.content: You now understand Wraith's abilities. +1 damage against this type.

entries.title: Bestiary: Ghoul (Mastery)
entries.content: You now understand Ghoul's abilities. +1 damage against this type.

entries.title: Bestiary: Minotaur (Mastery)
entries.content: You now understand Minotaur's abilities. +1 damage against this type.

entries.title: Bestiary: Skeleton (Mastery)
entries.content: You now understand Skeleton's abilities. +1 damage against this type.

entries.title: Bestiary: Dark Cultist (Mastery)
entries.content: You now understand Dark Cultist's abilities. +1 damage against this type.

entries.title: The Alchemist's Last Brew
entries.content:
I drank the golden liquid...

Liquid Gold makes you immobile but nearly invincible.

entries.title: Bestiary: Putrid Shambler (Mastery)
entries.content: You now understand Putrid Shambler's abilities. +1 damage against this type.

entries.title: The Grinning Chest
entries.content:
It looked like treasure...

Ornate chests have a 5% chance to be a Mimic.

active.name: The Truffle Smuggler
active.description: Gather 3 Cave-Truffles from smashed barrels on floors 1-5.
